_comment: Configuration for Saro's Creative Tab mod

_permissionLevels.EVERYONE: All players can perform this action
_permissionLevels.OP_LEVEL_2: Only operators with level 2+ can perform this action
_permissionLevels.OP_LEVEL_3: Only operators with level 3+ can perform this action
_permissionLevels.OP_LEVEL_4: Only operators with level 4 can perform this action
